_fragment: Phase 11 (session0-polish) — cleanup. Adds cleanup timed events and clarifies the stale midnight tomas_breaks cue.
_note: The existing tomas_breaks timed event at 1274-10-16T00:00:00 in session-0.json cannot be edited via the array-concat fragment loader (fragments append, they do not replace). Instead this fragment adds a new sibling event at 1274-10-16T00:01:00 that makes the midnight cue's role explicit: it is a narration stub, the real transform already happened at 22:00 in ambient-life-service.js.

data.description: Clarifies the stale tomas_breaks cue one minute earlier
data.text: NOTE: the tomas_breaks timed event that just fired at midnight is a stale DM cue. Ambient-life-service.js executed the actual transformation at 22:00. If state.npcs.tomas.phase === 'transformed' already: the midnight message is atmosphere only — Tomas is already a werewolf (contained in cellar, or loose in the room). If he is somehow still human at midnight: something intervened (party healed him, contained him pre-22:00, killed him early). In that case, treat tomas_breaks as flavor and use the PC actions to explain why.
